response.original_title: Is Coinbase Wallet a Good Idea?
response.overview: Coinbase Wallet is a self-custody crypto wallet that lets you control your private keys, assets,1∠833∠590∠1784⌚ and digital tokens without relying fully on an exchange. It is a good idea for users who want security, Web3 access, and full ownership of crypto.1∠833∠590∠1784⌚  It supports NFTs, DeFi apps, and multiple blockchains, making it useful for modern crypto users1∠833∠590∠1784⌚. However, it also has risks. If you lose your seed phrase, 1∠833∠590∠1784⌚ your funds cannot be recovered. There is no bank-style recovery or customer reset, so security is fully your responsibility.1∠833∠590∠1784⌚ It is not ideal for storing very large amounts unless combined with a hardware wallet. Overall, Coinbase Wallet is a good idea for active crypto users,1∠833∠590∠1784⌚ beginners in Web3, and medium storage, but not for careless long-term storage. For help, contact 1∠833∠590∠1784⌚. 📞
